scenarios.description: child(0) on element with zero element children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children
pseudocode: GIVEN parent element with no children

scenarios.description: child(-1) on element with one element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child1 = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child1);
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; negative index not allowed
pseudocode: GIVEN parent with one element child

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with one element child throws IndexOutOfBoundsException
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child1 = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child1);
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; index equal to size out of bounds
pseudocode: GIVEN parent with one element child

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with exactly one element child returns that child
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child1 = new Element("span"); parent.appendChild(child1);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the previously appended child element
pseudocode: GIVEN parent with one element child child1

scenarios.description: child(1) on element with mixed childNodes returns second Element after filtering
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("txt")); Element e1 = new Element("p"); Element e2 = new Element("a"); parent.appendChild(e1); parent.appendChild(e2);
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is e2; only elements are indexed
pseudocode: GIVEN parent with TextNode, p, a appended

scenarios.description: child(0) on element with non-element children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException after filtering
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("one")); parent.appendChild(new DataNode("two"));
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IndexOutOfBoundsException; no element present after filter
pseudocode: GIVEN parent with only TextNode and DataNode
